text:
Chronic Conditions Warehouse Virtual Research Data Center 
MedPAR Codebook │ April 2025 │ V 4.2 

249 
WARD_DAY_CNT 
LABEL: 
Ward Day Count 
DESCRIPTION: The count of the number of ward care days used by the beneficiary for the stay. 
SHORT NAME: WARDDAY 
LONG NAME: WARD_DAY_CNT 
TYPE: 
NUM 
LENGTH: 
8 
SOURCE: 
MedPAR (derived) 
VALUES: 
— 
COMMENT: 
This field is derived by accumulating the revenue center unit count associated with accommodation 
revenue center code 015x from all claim
